    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActivityLogController
    Controller for the activity log view (FR-08, FR-16).
    ConflictDetectionService
    Service for detecting scheduling conflicts between rules and schedules.
    DatabaseConfig
    Loads optional database settings from environment variables or a local properties file.
    DatabaseSettings
    JDBC connection settings for the SmartHome auth database.
    Device
    Represents a Smart Home Device.
    DeviceEnergyConstants
    Centralized source of truth for device nominal power consumption values.
    DevicesController
    Controller for device control and state display.
    EnergyController
    Controller for the energy dashboard view with time-based navigation.
    EnergyService
    Defines operations for calculating and querying energy consumption data.
    IntegrationDevice
    Represents a physical IoT device discovered through the optional integration layer.
    IoTIntegrationService
    Defines operations for optional MQTT integration with physical IoT devices.
    IoTIntegrationService.DeviceStateChangeListener
    Callback interface for device state changes received from the broker.
    IoTIntegrationService.IoTConfiguration
    Configuration record for MQTT broker settings.
    IoTSettingsController
    Controller for the IoT settings view.
    JdbcEnergyService
    JDBC-backed EnergyService implementation.
    JdbcLogService
    JDBC-backed LogService implementation.
    JdbcNotificationService
    JDBC-backed NotificationService implementation.
    JdbcRoomService
    JDBC-backed RoomService implementation.
    JdbcRuleService
    JDBC-backed RuleService implementation.
    JdbcSceneService
    JDBC-backed SceneService implementation.
    JdbcScheduleService
    JDBC-based schedule service for persistent schedule storage and recurring execution.
    JdbcUserRegistrationStore
    JDBC-backed registration store for the auth users table.
    JdbcUserService
    JDBC-backed user service implementation.
    LogEntry
    Represents a Log Entry for activity tracking.
    LoginController
    Controller for the login view.
    LoginController.LoginCallback
    Callback interface for login and registration events.
    LogService
    Defines operations for recording and querying activity log entries.
    MainController
    Main controller for the application shell.
    MainController.MainCallback
    Callback interface for main controller events.
    MockEnergyService
    Mock Energy Service providing day and week energy consumption data.
    MockEnergyService.AggregationPeriod
    Enumeration of energy aggregation periods.
    MockEnergyService.EnergySnapshot
     
    MockIoTIntegrationService
    Mock MQTT integration layer for demonstrating optional physical device connectivity.
    MockLogService
    Mock Log Service providing activity logging functionality.
    MockNotificationService
    Mock in-app notification service.
    MockRoomService
    Mock Room Service providing room management functionality.
    MockRuleService
    Mock Rule Service providing rule management functionality.
    MockSceneService
    Mock Scene Service providing smart scene management functionality.
    MockScheduleService
    Mock Schedule Service providing schedule management functionality.
    MockSimulationService
    Mock simulation service for replaying a full day without affecting live devices.
    MockSimulationService.SimulationConfiguration
     
    MockSimulationService.SimulationEvent
     
    MockSimulationService.SimulationPlan
     
    MockSmartHomeService
    Mock Smart Home Service providing simulated device management.
    MockUserService
    Mock User Service providing user management functionality.
    MockVacationModeService
    Mock vacation mode service for FR-21.
    MqttIntegrationService
    Real MQTT integration service using Eclipse Paho MQTT client.
    NotificationEntry
    Represents an in-app notification message.
    NotificationService
    Service interface for managing in-app notifications.
    NotificationType
    Represents the severity or category of an in-app notification.
    RegisterController
    Controller for the register view.
    RegisterController.RegisterCallback
    Callback interface for navigation from register view.
    Room
    Represents a Room in the SmartHome system.
    RoomsController
    Controller for the rooms view.
    RoomService
    Defines operations for managing rooms and devices within the smart-home system.
    Rule
    Represents a Rule in the SmartHome system.
    RuleEvaluator
    Evaluates whether a rule's condition is satisfied given the current device state or time.
    RulesController
    Controller for the rules view.
    RuleService
    Defines operations for managing automation rules in the smart-home system.
    RuleValidator
    Stateless service-layer guard that validates rule trigger type, condition, and source device before a rule is accepted into the system.
    RuleValidator.Result
    Validation result carrying a boolean flag and an optional reason.
    Scene
    Represents a Scene (set of device states) in the SmartHome system.
    ScenesController
    Controller for the scenes view.
    SceneService
    Defines operations for managing scenes in the smart-home system.
    Schedule
    Represents a Schedule in the SmartHome system.
    SchedulesController
    Controller for the schedules view.
    ScheduleService
    Defines the scheduling operations exposed to the smart-home UI and services.
    SchedulingConflict
    Represents a scheduling conflict between two rules or schedules.
    ServiceRegistry
    Resolves shared service implementations used across the application.
    SettingsController
    Controller for the settings view.
    SimulationController
    Controller for the simulation view.
    SimulationDeviceState
    Represents a simulated device state used only inside the time-lapse replay.
    SmartHomeApp
    Main application class for Smart Home Orchestrator.
    User
    Represents a User in the SmartHome system.
    UserRegistrationStore
    Store abstraction for persisted user registration.
    UserRegistrationStore.DuplicateEmailException
    Exception thrown when attempting to register duplicate email.
    UserRegistrationStore.PersistedUser
    Persisted user record with authentication and role information.
    UserRegistrationStore.StoreConfigurationException
    Exception thrown for store configuration errors.
    UserRegistrationStore.StoreException
    Base exception for store-related errors.
    UsersController
    Controller for the user management view.
    UserService
    Abstract base service for user authentication and management.
    UserService.LoginStatus
    Login/authentication status outcomes.
    UserService.RegistrationStatus
    Registration status outcomes.
    VacationModeConfig
    Stores the active vacation mode configuration for the mock prototype.
    VacationModeController
    Controller for the vacation mode view.
    WeekdaySpec
    Stateless parser and matcher for weekday prefixes used in time trigger conditions.
